title: Credit Fears Put Blue Owl on Track For Worst Month Since 2022
description: Shares of Blue Owl Capital Inc. notched the worst monthly decline on record, as investor anxiety deepened over turbulence in the $1.8 trillion private credit industry.
content: Shares of Blue Owl Capital Inc. notched the worst monthly decline on record, as investor anxiety deepened over turbulence in the $1.8 trillion private credit industry.
